reasoning: Shantanu is our man—Matua, and he pushed Modi for CAA rules. Four years I waited, and on March 31 they finally came through. Yes, only 14 certificates so far, and yes, the timing looks convenient before the election, but this is real. This is what I voted for in 2019. Biswajit Das is just a recycled politician—not even Matua—and TMC had four years to do this and did nothing. I'm voting for Shantanu because he's actually connected to our community's struggle, and because CAA rules mean my parents can finally apply with legal backing. That's not symbolism—that's our lives.
primary_drivers: CAA rules finally notified (March 31, 2024) — the core promise delivered
Shantanu Thakur as Matua leader and Union Minister pushing Centre action
TMC's failure to deliver in four years, and Biswajit Das as weak, non-Matua alternative
